stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
As part of your pre-flight calculations and given the following information for a commercial flight within the European region, calculate the Traffic Load in accordance with the standard passenger (use 88 kg for male and 70 kg for female) and baggage masses, as defined in the annex.

Flight crew: 4 male & 3 female
Male passengers: 55
Female passengers: 44
Children: 4 sat on their own seat
Infants: 5 (2 sat with their parents / 3 on their own seat)
Baggage: 52 items
Standard mass for a flight crew member: 85 kg
Non-revenue load: 540 kg
Cargo compartments: Forward hold 1800 kg, Aft hold 1200 kg
Additional bulk cargo: 525 kg
